decisions.title: Finalize Explore V2 (E2) GA Readiness Criteria
decisions.context: E2 UI bugs (ENG-10024 panel lockup, ENG-9717 sharelink issues) and missing parity features (ENG-9552 searchable calc inputs, ENG-8579 timestamp freezing) surfacing as GA blockers. Need clear go/no-go decision for Q2 GA target.
decisions.blockedBy: Critical bugs and feature parity assessment incomplete

arguments.for: Customers demanding E2 features (log scale, improved performance). Delaying further risks competitive positioning and internal team morale.
arguments.against: Launching with known UX issues (panel lockup, sharelink bugs) damages trust and creates support burden. Missing features like searchable calc channels reduce decision velocity for power users.

decisions.title: Commit to Canvas as Primary Workflow Orchestration Layer
decisions.context: ENG-9506 improving Canvas child execution, ENG-9296 building internal MCP server. Canvas adoption growing but unclear if it replaces Python Rules or complements. Affects Q3-Q4 roadmap investment.

arguments.for: Canvas enables visual decision workflows (Embed Deeper pillar). Customer feedback positive. Integration with MCP server creates AI-augmented workflows. Clear differentiation vs competitors.
arguments.against: Python Rules serve different power-user segment. Splitting resources between two orchestration tools dilutes velocity. Canvas maturity still evolving (run_child_canvas helper updates suggest API instability).

decisions.title: Accelerate Client-Side Parsing Investment (Parquet, TDMS, HDF5)
decisions.context: Three parallel efforts: ENG-10057 (Parquet CLI), ENG-9980 (TDMS client-side), ENG-10061 (HDF5 frontend). Significant eng investment but unclear business impact prioritization.

arguments.for: Reduces backend load, improves import speed (Signal>Evidence faster). Customer pain point for large file workflows. Differentiated capability vs competitors stuck on server-side only.
arguments.against: Browser memory constraints limit scalability. Maintenance burden across file formats. Unclear customer willingness to pay for faster imports vs investing in core analytics features.

decisions.title: Define SCIM Sync Health Visibility Scope for Customer Admins
decisions.context: ENG-9926 adds SCIM sync health for customer admins. Embed Deeper pillar requires enterprise admin features, but scope unclear (read-only dashboards vs actionable controls?).

arguments.for: Enterprise customers demand self-service admin tools. Reduces support tickets. Competitive table stakes for SSO/SCIM workflows.
arguments.against: Exposing sync errors to customers without actionable remediation creates anxiety. May surface underlying infrastructure issues we're not ready to explain/fix.

timeAudit.weekSummary: 55% meeting load this week—above healthy threshold. Three 1:1s today suggest urgent alignment needs. Only 2 focus blocks limits deep work on E2 GA blockers.
alerts: Zero dedicated focus time for E2 GA decision prep before 4/14 deadline
Canvas strategy decision (4/21) has no calendar holds scheduled
Back-to-back meetings 9am-3pm today prevent context switching recovery

events.title: SCIM Visibility Scope Decision
events.description: Define customer admin UI scope for SCIM sync health (ENG-9926). Impacts Q2 enterprise feature roadmap.

events.title: E2 Bug Triage: Panel Lockup
events.description: Engineering deep dive on ENG-10024 panel config lockup. Determine if GA blocker or post-GA fix.

events.title: E2 GA Go/No-Go Decision
events.description: Leadership review of E2 feature parity, critical bugs (panel lockup, sharelinks), and customer beta feedback. Approve Q2 GA or defer to Q3.

events.title: Client-Side Parsing Prioritization
events.description: Choose 2 of 3 formats (Parquet/TDMS/HDF5) for Q3 GA. Align eng capacity with customer demand signals.

events.title: Calc Channel Searchable Inputs Ship
events.description: ENG-9552 deploys to prod. Key E2 parity feature for power users.

events.title: Canvas Strategy Commitment
events.description: Decide Canvas positioning vs Python Rules. Defines Q3-Q4 workflow orchestration investment split.

events.title: MCP Server Internal MVP Demo
events.description: ENG-9296 internal demo of Canvas + MCP server integration. Gates customer beta planning.

events.title: HDF5 Frontend Beta Launch
events.description: ENG-10061 ships HDF5 frontend to select beta customers. Validates client-side parsing demand.
